solver_profile.bounded_oracle: ESSO canonical IR plus fail-closed Z3 1-inductiveness gate
solver_profile.acceptance: every reference query succeeds under both requested solvers; missing solver, SAT counterexample, unknown, timeout, error, or disagreement fails closed

design_discoveries.description: ESSO enum symbols are globally resolved within one IR; the initial reused symbols were ambiguous and were namespaced before semantic evidence was accepted.
design_discoveries.impact: model construction correction; no protocol conclusion

design_discoveries.description: The initial plan model was reachable-safe but not 1-inductive because PlanNone did not exclude already-visible effects. PlanNoneIsPristine was added to make the lifecycle invariant explicit.
design_discoveries.impact: strengthened semantic contract for plan lifecycle

design_discoveries.description: A failed mutant counts as evidence only when ESSO produces InitNotInv or InvNotInductive with a concrete counterexample. Parse, unsupported-feature, timeout, unknown, and generic solver failure do not kill a mutant.

claim_scope: six finite ESSO reference models are canonical and 1-inductive under the recorded source revision
six targeted disaster mutants produce semantic invariant counterexamples
all six reference models pass the recorded Z3 and CVC5 multi-solver workflow
non_claims: the RFCs are not approved protocol semantics
the authoring track is not an independent semantic reviewer
bounded ESSO induction does not establish unbounded correctness
the abstraction from ZRM or ZRPF implementation state to ESSO state is not yet proved
no production Rust implementation has been differentially checked
no canonical byte or hash schema for the proposed objects is frozen
no storage, cryptographic, recursive-proof, consensus, data-availability, privacy, or production-readiness claim
next_required_evidence: reference Rust implementations and differential tests
Kani, Loom, fuzz, mutation, and crash-injection evidence
Class E canonical byte tables and independent vectors
recursive guest and accumulator refinement evidence
